hero.title: Gym Management Software for
hero.subtitle: An all-in-one gym management software to manage memberships, billing, attendance, workouts, staff, and reports from a single dashboard. Built for growing gyms and multi-location fitness businesses.

valueProps.title: Everything in One Place
valueProps.desc: Manage members, enquiries, follow-ups, payments, attendance, expenses — all from a single dashboard. No spreadsheets, no confusion.

valueProps.title: Better Control Over Staff & Trainers
valueProps.desc: Assign staff roles, manage attendance & salaries, track PT sessions, set sales targets, and measure performance.

valueProps.title: Happier, More Engaged Members
valueProps.desc: Members track calories, PRs, steps, and water intake through a branded app with exclusive brand vouchers.

valueProps.title: Ready to Grow With You
valueProps.desc: Whether you run one gym or multiple branches, the software scales with your business without breaking workflows.

valueProps.title: Support That Actually Helps
valueProps.desc: Smooth onboarding with complete data migration, a dedicated relationship manager, WhatsApp support, and monthly check-ins.

valueProps.title: Clear View of Your Revenue
valueProps.desc: See exactly how much you earn, pending payments, upcoming payments, and which memberships are due for renewal.

showcases.desc: Control gym entry with biometric check-in/check-out and track accurate attendance for members and staff across devices.

faqs.q: Will this gym management software work for my type of gym?
faqs.a: Yes. The software is designed for single gyms, fitness studios, personal training centers, and multi-location gym chains. You can configure memberships, billing, and access rules based on how your gym operates.

faqs.q: How long does it take to set up the software for my gym?
faqs.a: Most gyms can go live within a few days. Setup includes gym configuration, member import, billing setup, and staff access. Our onboarding team guides you through the entire process.

faqs.q: Can I manage multiple gym branches under one account?
faqs.a: Yes. You can manage multiple gym branches from a single dashboard while keeping branch-wise access, reports, and staff control.

faqs.q: What happens to my existing member data?
faqs.a: Your existing member data can be securely imported into the system, including member details, memberships, and payment history — ensuring a smooth transition without data loss.

faqs.q: Will this software help reduce membership drop-outs?
faqs.a: Yes. Automated reminders, follow-ups, progress tracking, and clear communication help improve member engagement and reduce drop-outs over time.

faqs.q: Is this gym management software secure?
faqs.a: Yes. The software uses secure cloud infrastructure with controlled access for owners, managers, trainers, and staff to protect business and member data.
